summary: AWS S3 us-east-1 outage from typo during routine playbook; downstream services across the internet went down.
Cloudflare global outage caused by regex with catastrophic backtracking deployed to WAF.
GitHub 24-hour degradation from network partition causing MySQL replication topology split.
GitLab data loss when sysadmin removed production directory on standby; six hours of work lost.
Stripe API outage from cascading shard failover; downstream merchants saw elevated errors.
AWS Kinesis us-east-1 outage from OS thread limit exhaustion during scale-up event.
Discord outage from Cassandra GC pauses under increased load; servers became unresponsive.
Fastly global CDN outage triggered by single customer's valid config update exposing latent bug.
Akamai DNS outage from software update; financial and airline systems affected.
Facebook 6-hour outage from BGP withdrawal during routine maintenance; backbone DNS unreachable.
Azure South Central US outage from cooling failure during thunderstorm; hardware loss.
Roblox 73-hour outage from Consul performance degradation under sustained high contention.
Instapaper outage from MySQL table size limit (2 TB) hit on legacy filesystem; couldn't accept writes.
PayPal global outage from database failover that left inconsistent state across shards.
Tarsnap multi-day outage from disk failure cascading through RAID rebuild process.
Knight Capital $440M loss in 45 minutes from deploying old code to one of eight servers.
Cloudflare outage from BGP route leak on backbone network; ~50% of traffic dropped.
Google outage from auth system storage quota issue; Gmail, YouTube, Drive all affected.
Slack outage tied to AWS Transit Gateway scaling issues at start of post-holiday traffic surge.
Monzo bank outage from Cassandra cluster split-brain during attempted cluster expansion.
Segment pipeline backed up after Kafka consumer hit GC death spiral on hot partition.
Shopify checkout slowdown during high traffic from MySQL hot shard on flash sale merchant.
Twitter outage from backend infrastructure rollout; service degraded for ~7 hours.
Spotify slowdown after expired certificate caused failover loops in service mesh.
Reddit multi-hour outage from Kubernetes upgrade triggering pod evictions across critical pods.
